name: io.github.Top5StocksAPI/mcp-server
description: Daily AI-ranked stock, crypto, and macro research data from the Top 5 Stocks API.

environmentVariables.name: TOP5STOCKS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for starter/pro/ultra-tier tools. Free tools work without a key. Get a key at https://top5stocks.netlify.app/members.html
